app.title: Self Profile System
app.description: A private self-reflection system to track strengths, weaknesses, skills, and notes over time.
app.footer: Your private growth journal — stored locally in your browser.

hero.title: Built to help you understand yourself through data
hero.subtext: Most people live without a clear picture of who they are, how they change, or what actually drives their growth. This app is a small, honest attempt to turn reflection into something you can see — not just remember.
hero.tagline: Built by Ahmed Al-Madhaji — while trying to understand himself.
hero.creator: Ahmed Al-Madhaji

problem.title: What's broken today
problem.intro: Self-understanding rarely fails because people don't care. It fails because there is no system:

items.lost: It's easy to feel lost about who you are and what you're actually improving
items.noTracking: Personal growth is rarely tracked with the same care as work or fitness
items.noProgress: Real progress is hard to see when it's only stored in memory
items.memory: Memory is unreliable — we rewrite our past without noticing
items.noOs: There is no personal "operating system" for how you live and grow

solution.title: A personal OS, not a notes app
solution.intro: This is not another journal. It's a lightweight system to capture your strengths, weaknesses, skills, and reflections — then read them back as patterns over time.
solution.osLabel: Personal Operating System for Human Growth

entries.title: Entries
entries.desc: Structured reflections you can rate, tag, and revisit

insights.title: Insights
insights.desc: Proven realizations — wisdom you don't want to forget

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.desc: Charts that answer questions, not just display numbers

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.desc: A chronological map of how you've been changing

philosophy.title: How I think about it
philosophy.intro: A human being is not a fixed label — it's a system of behaviors, moods, habits, and choices. When you log them honestly, patterns appear.

items.measurable: Growth should be measurable, even if imperfectly
items.system: Self-awareness needs a system — not random thinking once a month
items.datapoint: Every experience can be a data point toward understanding

creator.title: Who built this
creator.story: I'm Ahmed Raed — an independent developer who enjoys AI and building personal systems. I made this while working on my own clarity, not as a startup pitch.
creator.background: I like tools that help humans think better about themselves — simple, local, private, and honest.
creator.motivation: The goal is to improve how we understand ourselves through data we already generate: our reflections, ratings, and habits over time.

closing.quote: You cannot improve what you don't understand.
closing.note: This project will keep evolving — one entry, one insight, one pattern at a time.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.chunkDescription: This page reference is outdated — usually caused by a stale dev build. Reload to fetch the latest version.
errors.genericDescription: An unexpected error occurred while loading this page.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Your personal growth operating system — track, reflect, improve.
dashboard.growthPulseHint: Key signals from your reflection history
dashboard.noEntries: No entries yet. Start by adding your first reflection.

messages: Every entry you write is a step toward understanding yourself.
Small reflections today build a stronger you tomorrow.
Awareness is the first step toward change.
You are building a better version of yourself, one entry at a time.
Consistency in reflection creates clarity in life.
Growth is not a destination — it is a daily practice.
Honest self-reflection turns weakness into direction.
The person you want to become is shaped by what you notice today.
Discipline grows when you name it, track it, and return to it.
Your future self will thank you for the honesty you show now.
Progress is quiet until you look back and see how far you have come.
Clarity comes from returning to your thoughts again and again.
You do not need perfection — you need presence and persistence.
Each strength you record is proof of who you already are.
Facing a weakness is an act of courage, not failure.
Skills sharpen when you celebrate progress, not only outcomes.
Notes are anchors — they hold what your mind might forget.
Self-awareness is a superpower you strengthen with every entry.
One honest line today can change how you show up tomorrow.
You are the author of your growth story — keep writing it.
Reflection turns experience into wisdom.
What you measure with care, you improve with intention.
A calmer mind begins with a clearer record of your inner world.
Trust the process — small steps compound into real change.
You are allowed to grow at your own pace and still call it success.
Return to this space whenever you need to remember who you are becoming.
The best investment you can make is understanding yourself deeply.
Naming your patterns is how you start to change them.
Today’s reflection is tomorrow’s confidence.
Stay curious about yourself — there is always more to discover.
You are doing meaningful work simply by paying attention.

addEntry.title: Add Entry
addEntry.description: Capture a strength, weakness, skill, or personal note.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.description: All entries sorted by date, newest first.

entryDetail.notFoundHint: This entry may have been deleted.
entryDetail.deleteConfirm: Delete this entry permanently? This cannot be undone.

form.title: Title
form.tagsWhat: Tags help organize your thoughts and make them easier to find later.
form.tagsArabicCommaHint: Please use English commas (,) for now.
form.saveError: Could not save entry. Please try again.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Understand your patterns — every chart answers one question about your growth.
analytics.growthEmpty: Add entries to see your growth trend.
analytics.consistencyEmpty: Log reflections weekly to reveal your consistency pattern.
analytics.typeComparisonEmpty: No entries yet — start logging to compare your focus areas.
analytics.correlationEmpty: Need at least two active weeks to analyze effort vs outcome.
analytics.heatmapEmpty: No activity recorded in this period.
analytics.insightsDesc: Automated signals from your reflection history

title.down: Recent ratings suggest a dip in confidence
title.flat: Your growth pace is steady, not volatile

growth.description: Weekly average rating — higher means stronger self-assessment over time.

takeaway.up: Ratings rose by {delta} points — your reflections are translating into higher confidence (latest: {latest}/10).
takeaway.down: Ratings dropped {delta} points recently — consider revisiting what changed in your routine.
takeaway.flat: Ratings hold near {latest}/10 — consistency matters more than spikes right now.

typeComparison.title: {type} dominates your reflection focus
typeComparison.titleEmpty: Where do you invest your reflection energy?
typeComparison.description: Compares how often you log strengths, weaknesses, skills, and notes.
typeComparison.takeawayStrong: {ratio}% of trait entries are strengths — you're building on what works.
typeComparison.takeawayWeak: Weaknesses lead at {ratio}% of trait entries — a growth opportunity to address.
typeComparison.takeawayBalanced: Strengths and weaknesses are balanced ({ratio}% strength ratio) — healthy self-awareness.

title.flat: You maintain a stable reflection rhythm

consistency.description: How many entries you log each week — frequency drives deeper insights.

takeaway.up: {total} entries logged across these weeks — peak week hit {peak} entries. Momentum is building.
takeaway.down: Only {total} entries recently — consistency unlocks better trend analysis.
takeaway.flat: {total} entries with a steady weekly pace — reliability beats intensity.

tags.title: #{tag} is your most recurring theme
tags.description: Top focus tags — where your mind spends the most reflection time.
tags.takeaway: #{tag} appears in {count} entries — this is a core thread in your personal narrative.

correlation.titleAligned: More entries correlate with higher self-ratings
correlation.titleMixed: Effort and outcomes aren't moving in sync yet
correlation.titleEmpty: Does showing up more improve how you feel?
correlation.description: Each dot is one week: horizontal = entries logged, vertical = average rating.
correlation.takeawayAligned: Weeks with more entries tend to score higher — consistency appears to pay off.
correlation.takeawayMixed: High activity doesn't always lift ratings — quality of reflection may matter more than volume.
correlation.takeawayEmpty: Log across multiple weeks to see if effort and outcomes align.

heatmap.titleActive: You show up regularly — reflection is becoming a habit
heatmap.titleSparse: Gaps in your reflection rhythm are visible
heatmap.description: Daily entry density over the last {weeks} weeks — darker means more activity.
heatmap.takeawayActive: {activeDays} active days with {totalEntries} entries — your habit has real momentum.
heatmap.takeawaySparse: Only {activeDays} active days — even 2–3 entries per week compounds over time.

insights.empty: Start adding entries to unlock personalized growth insights.
insights.lowActivity: Low reflection activity in the last 7 days — your last entry was {days} days ago.
insights.weaknessTag: Weakness in "{tag}" appears frequently this week ({count} entries).
insights.positiveRatingTrend: Positive growth trend — your average rating rose from {prior} to {recent} over the last two weeks.
insights.strengthTag: You are consistently improving in {tag} — {count} strength entries logged.
insights.steady: Keep logging reflections — more data will unlock deeper insights.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your preferences — saved locally on this device.
settings.appearanceHint: Your theme choice is remembered after you close the app.
settings.languageHint: Your language preference is remembered after you close the app.
settings.motivationalMessagesHint: Custom messages appear on your dashboard welcome card.
settings.futureHint: Additional options will appear here in future updates.

import.title: Import Profile
import.description: Restore a previously exported Personal OS profile.
import.invalidDescription: This file is not a valid Personal OS export.
import.unsupportedDescription: This export was created using a newer version of Personal OS.
import.replaceWarning: Your current local data will be replaced.
import.successSubtitle: {count, plural, one {# entry restored.} other {# entries restored.}}
import.failedDescription: Something went wrong while restoring your profile.

motivationalMessages.title: Motivational messages
motivationalMessages.description: Create personal messages that inspire you on the dashboard.
motivationalMessages.placeholder: Write something meaningful to your future self...
motivationalMessages.empty: No custom messages yet. Add your first one above.

insightsJournal.title: Personal Insights
insightsJournal.description: Your wisdom database — proven truths you've learned about yourself.
insightsJournal.addDescription: Capture a realization, not just an event.
insightsJournal.notFoundHint: This insight may have been deleted.
insightsJournal.empty: No insights yet. Add your first realization.
insightsJournal.emptyWidget: Add personal insights to see one featured here each day.

form.title: Title
form.realizationPlaceholder: What did you discover about yourself?
form.causePlaceholder: Why do you think this happens?
form.saveError: Could not save insight. Please try again.

hero.eyebrow: Personal OS · see yourself through time
hero.headline: Everything you live… leaves a trace in you
hero.subheadline: Athar is a system that helps you see yourself clearly over time. It turns your thoughts, days, and notes into traces you can read — instead of losing them in the noise.
hero.ctaSecondary: See what your trace looks like
hero.micro: The problem was never that you weren't growing… but that you couldn't see the trace of your growth.

problem.title: You live more than you remember
items: Change that happens — but you can't see
problem.question: "Am I actually moving forward… or just repeating myself?"

idea.title: What if everything you live… didn't vanish?
idea.subintro: It's a system that turns your life into data you can see:

items.text: Every day = a layer of who you are
Every week = the shape of your growth
Every idea = part of your full picture

before: Your day passes without clear meaning
You remember little and forget much
You feel stuck despite your efforts
after: You understand your behavior instead of guessing

steps.text: Write what passed through your day
The system turns it into a trace
It gets analyzed inside the system

items.title: Deeper awareness
items.description: See what you don't notice in yourself

items.title: A timeline journey
items.description: Every day becomes part of a story

items.title: Self-understanding
items.description: Don't rely on feeling — rely on your data

shift.title: You don't need motivation… you need vision
shift.body: Athar gives you something deeper than hype: a continuous understanding of yourself.

creator.title: Built from a personal need
creator.p1: Athar wasn't built as a product first. It started as a way to understand myself.
creator.p2: I lived like anyone else: thinking a lot… improving sometimes… getting lost often.
creator.p3: The problem wasn't change — it was that I couldn't see it.
creator.p4: So I started building a system that turns life into something visible.

audience.title: For people who think deeply
items: Those who feel there's more inside than shows

final.title: Start seeing yourself… instead of guessing
final.closing: You don't need to become someone new… you need to see who you've already become.

landing.footer: Athar — your private growth journal. Data stays on your device.
